traceReason: repository-affecting work on a feature/ branch
taskSummary: Make project dashboard objectives editable in place as Markdown and save changed Markdown on textarea blur.
precedenceDecisions: GitHub Diamond governed branch naming, trace creation, validation, commit, push and PR creation.
ResearchOps Developer Control governed repository layers, generated static page parity and route-state tests.
Multi-Functional Team governed public-sector product assurance and avoiding unnecessary scope.
GOV.UK Design System governed textarea, keyboard access and focus-state handling.
followUpFindings: The first implementation left the browser ordered-list marker visible beside the edit textarea. The marker is generated by the parent ol/li structure and is not part of the editable region, while the Markdown 1. is part of the textarea value.
Codex review identified that using a one-shot blur listener prevented retrying a failed PATCH from the still-open editor.

Acceptance follow-up confirmed that clearing an objective textarea should splice that objective out, save the shorter objectives payload, and re-render the list or empty state without orphaned editor or list-item HTML.

reviewThreads.author: chatgpt-codex-connector
reviewThreads.disposition: Added +1, removed the one-shot blur listener, added route-state coverage, validated retry behavior with local Playwright, replied, and resolved.

validation: npm run agent:model -- task text: passed
npm run lint: passed with existing repository warnings and no errors
Local Playwright preview check: passed for desktop click-to-edit and blur-save, visible focus state, mobile keyboard edit and blur-save, and no mobile horizontal overflow
Follow-up local Playwright preview check: passed for desktop and mobile edit mode with the li marker hidden and the Markdown 1. retained inside the textarea
Codex review retry check: local Playwright preview forced the first PATCH to fail and confirmed the editor stayed open and the next blur saved without reopening

Follow-up local Playwright preview check: clearing and blurring the first objective removed it, promoted the remaining objective without an empty list item, and clearing the final objective replaced the ordered list with the No objectives yet empty state with no editor, editing class or orphaned li
validationNotRun: npm test -- --ci did not run because node --test rejected the forwarded --ci flag.
Live Cloudflare Pages deployment verification was not run because this branch has not yet been merged or deployed.
residualRisks: The browser interaction was validated against a local static preview with mocked project API responses, not a deployed preview environment.
Live deployment will update through the normal PR merge and Pages deployment path.
